section.heading: Consolidation of functions

content.p: Subject to section 2143 of this title, to the greatest extent practicable, the functions of the consolidated bank shall be consolidated in the central office of the bank.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 92–181, title III, § 3.23, as added Pub. L. 100–233, title IV, § 415(2), Jan. 6, 1988, 101 Stat. 1644.)
